message:
feat(lowering): reserve root scope bindings and validate named export clauses

Extend the IR0→IR1 lowering pipeline with three improvements:

- Root scope binding reservation via reserve_root_scope_bindings():
  pre-scan function/var/let/const declarations in the module body and
  register their bindings before lowering begins, enabling forward
  references in export clauses.

- Proper named export clause handling: parse_named_export_clause_bindings()
  supports "export { local as exported }" syntax. Named exports now
  resolve against pre-reserved root bindings and emit
  SemanticError::UndeclaredExportBinding for references to undeclared
  identifiers.

- Internal binding names use make_internal_binding_name() with a
  "@@franken_internal_" prefix to avoid collisions with user code.

Updates lowering_binding_conflict_integration, lowering_coverage_integration,
lowering_pipeline_integration, and parser_third_party_rerun_kit tests to
match new semantics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
